eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Nance, NE; at 2:50 PM on JUL 17, 2026 Effective until 4:50 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Manhunt underway in Fullerton for Gibbs Tristan Cole. Unknown if they are armed at this time. Fleeing law enforcement and is hiding on foot looking to steal a vehicle and flee the state. Suspect has bleach dyed hair, red t-shirt and shorts. Do not approach the individual, if you see anything suspicious call 911.
